2026-05-18.title: Recovery: Full Day Off (All Levels)
2026-05-18.description:
SESSION:
Full day off from any training. Can include some light stretching and mobility work today if you wish.

PURPOSE:
To allow an opportunity for your body to recover and adapt to recent training, and to ensure you're feeling fresh for other key training sessions in the week.

2026-05-18.title: 50min Easy - choice run
2026-05-18.description: Just nice and easy, getting into a nice rhythm.

2026-05-18.title: Swim | 2 x (10 x 50) + 300 PBP | VO2 Max Set 1.1
2026-05-18.description:
Warm up:
----------------------
400 easy

6 x 100 PD & Fins (25 build into LT2 + 25 @LT2 + 50 easy) rest 20's

Main set:
---------------------
1 set no equipment, 2nd with PB, 3rd with PB&PD

2 x (10 x 50 @ Vo2 Max send-off on 1min)
after each set kick 100 easy
Rest 2min
300 PB + P

Cool down:
---------------------
200 easy

2026-05-25.title: Technical i | Long Intervals Pull | Endurance
2026-05-25.description:
Progressive Warm Up:
__________________________________________
PB or Swim
6 x 25 (2 easy, 1 fast x 2)

Main Set:
__________________________________________
3 x 400 PB/Band as MMM (30 sec rests)

3 x 300 PB/PD as MMM (20 sec rests)

2 x 200 PB/Band as MMM (15 sec rests)

3 x 100 PB/PD as MMM (10s sec rests)

Cool Down:
__________________________________________
PB optional 10 sec rests
6 x 75 as 25 easy, 25 fast, 25 easy

2026-05-25.description:

Main set:
6x 3min / 1min EASY JOG
10min cool down

2026-05-25.title: 50min Easy - choice run
2026-05-25.description: Just nice and easy, getting into a nice rhythm.

2026-05-25.title: Endurance TEST: Long Steady Ride + Muscular TEST (Level 2, Level 3)
2026-05-25.description:
4H @ 60-70% FTP. During the ride do 5x 1min hard efforts to accumulate lactate. Clear it out then do 10M tempo, clear that out and fuel before starting the 1x 20M block @ best effort % FTP.

Dont start too hard, the 10min should gauge your level of readiness. Keep intensity in check wherever possible, but don't stress straying into Zone 1 on downhills or Zone 3 on steeper climbs.

PURPOSE: Test the outdoor power during a outdoor ride on a climb.

The late-stage Zone 3 riding also helps develop aerobic abilities within higher-power muscle fibres, and improves your ability to ride at higher wattages in the presence of existing fatigue.

Created by DBT coaching.

2026-05-25.title: Speed work | 4x 100m, 5x 200m, 6x 400m / 60s rest | Intervals
2026-05-25.description:
WU: 25min - EASY PACE - then;
4x 100m, 60s rest recovery,
5x 200m, 60s rest recovery,
6x 400m, 60s rest recovery,

(5min recovery between sets)

GO REALLY CONTROLLED ON THESE !!!

2026-06-01.description:
Please follow the workout details, with prescribed zones (and power targets if required) outlined below.
-
WU: 20min E
4x rounds of;
(5x 30s MOD /30s HARD) recovery 5min
CD: 10min E

2026-06-01.title: Run | 6x 2min HARD /90s | Pace
2026-06-01.description:
25 MIN TO 30 MIN WARM-UP AT AN EASY PAC
6x 2min HARDER (84% to 85% effort - very controlled - last rep a touch harder ) 90 sec Recovey jog -

6 min Cool-down jog

2026-06-01.title: Bike | Endurance | HR
2026-06-01.description:
1H30 recovery ride @ 55-70% Max HR.

PURPOSE: Allow for adaptations from previous hard workout, whilst keeping rhythm of training and muscles working without adding any further stress to the body.
